source_label: Grill et al., 'Bootstrap Your Own Latent', DeepMind (arXiv 2006.07733)
notes: Negative-pair-free SSL that bootstraps a target network from an online network (DeepMind 2020); the authors fixed no pronunciation, so it is both spelled out 'B-Y-O-L' and said as a word 'bee-OHL' — the follow-up BYOL-A audio paper even puns 'pronounced viola'.
